title: Neoregelia cruenta
intro: Neoregelia cruenta, commonly known as the Red Vase Bromeliad, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Neoregelia cruenta include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Neoregelia cruenta include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory infections.

parts: Neoregelia cruenta is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant's leaves are used in folk remedies for various health issues.
